jd:
高级测试架构师招聘。负责公司测试体系规划、自动化测试平台建设、CI/CD 流水线、接口测试、白盒测试、性能测试、回归测试、测试用例库、缺陷跟踪。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
Python Python Python Python Python — primary language for tooling.
Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest Pytest — framework design and extension.
MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL MySQL — schema review and SQL tuning.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — environment setup, shell scripting.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control and code review.
JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA JIRA — project tracking and release management.

需要熟悉自动化测试、接口测试、白盒测试、Web测试、APP测试、敏捷测试、回归测试、测试体系、测试用例、测试计划、缺陷跟踪、报告输出、CI/CD、Docker、Kubernetes、Jenkins、Prometheus、Grafana 等工具。
